title: A case-control study of Chinese Han patients reported that the rs2243093 (C;C) genotype has a...
summary: A case-control study of Chinese Han patients reported that the rs2243093 (C;C) genotype has an increase risk for coronary heart disease. A meta-analysis was performed and found that there is a strong association with risk of ischemic stroke, however, the authors suggest that this polymorphism may actually be linked with another (unknown) locus that is the culprit responsible for the increase in ischemic stroke risk.
detail: A case-control study of Chinese Han patients reported that the rs2243093 (C;C) genotype has an increase risk for coronary heart disease. title: GLUT1 deficiency syndrome 1? Feedback sought ..
summary: GLUT1 deficiency syndrome 1? Feedback sought ...
detail: Annotated in ClinVar as a disease-causing (pathogenic) mutation leading to GLUT1 deficiency syndrome 1, but by only one submitter, and this could be a carrier allele for a recessive form of GLUT1 deficiency rather than a dominant mutation (if it's pathogenic at all). Feel free to email SNPedia (info@snpedia.com) if you have this genotype and have a medical history including or not including symptoms of GLUT1 deficiency such as exercise-induced spasms.
